title: March of the Wooden Soldiers
writer: Frank Butler, Nick Grinde, Anna Alice Chapin
actors: Stan Laurel, Oliver Hardy, Virginia Karns
plot: Opposing the evil Barnaby, Ollie Dee and Stanley Dum try and fail to pay-off Mother Peep's mortgage and mislead his attempts to marry Little Bo. Enraged, Barnaby's Bogeymen are set on Toyland.
